title: Backend Developer Vacancy at HealthifyMe - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at HealthifyMe - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
HealthifyMe invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About HealthifyMe:
HealthifyMe is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HealthifyMe!
